description_long: This is a classic claw hammer with a robust, metallic head and a dark, ergonomic handle. The head features a flat striking face on one side for driving nails and a sharply curved claw on the opposite side for prying and removing nails. The handle appears to be slightly contoured for a comfortable grip, likely made from a composite or rubberized material to reduce vibration and enhance control. The hammer's overall design is utilitarian, with a smooth, slightly glossy finish on both the head and handle. No visible branding, markings, or decorative elements are present. The hammer appears clean and well-maintained, with no signs of wear or damage.
description: A classic claw hammer with a metallic head and a dark, ergonomic handle, featuring a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal. The finish is smooth and slightly glossy, with no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the hammer, highlighting the curved claw and flat striking face.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the width of the head and the split in the claw.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the claw and striking face.
description_view_3: Front view showing the circular striking face and the narrow profile of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Rubberized ergonomic grip, slightly contoured for comfort, dark in color, smooth with a matte finish.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head with a flat striking face and a sharply curved claw for nail removal, made of steel.
